```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(tseries)
library(lmtest)
library(knitr)
```

```{r}
INPUT_FILE <- "../../data/processed/merged_features_weekly.parquet"
ALPHA      <- 0.05
MAX_LAGS   <- c(1, 2, 4, 8)

CANDIDATE_PREDICTORS <- c(
  "api_energy_and_lubricants",
  "api_fertilisers_and_soil_improvers",
  "api_plant_protection_products",
  "api_fresh_fruit",
  "api_fresh_vegetables",
  "fuel_petrol_price",
  "fuel_diesel_price",
  "sppi_road_freight"
)

make_stationary <- function(x) {

  s <- x

  for (d in 0:2) {

    res <- tryCatch(
      adf.test(s[!is.na(s)]),
      error = function(e) list(p.value = 1)
    )

    if (res$p.value < ALPHA)
      return(list(series = s, d = d))

    s <- c(NA, diff(s))
  }

  list(series = s, d = 2)
}
```

```{r}
df <- arrow::read_parquet(INPUT_FILE) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(date)

commodities <- unique(df$commodity)
```

```{r}
all_results <- list()

for (comm in commodities) {

  sub <- df %>%
    filter(commodity == comm) %>%
    arrange(date)

  avail_preds <- CANDIDATE_PREDICTORS[
    CANDIDATE_PREDICTORS %in% names(sub) &
      sapply(
        CANDIDATE_PREDICTORS,
        function(v)
          sum(!is.na(sub[[v]])) > 30
      )
  ]

  tgt_st <- make_stationary(sub$target_price)

  target_s <- tgt_st$series

  for (pred_name in avail_preds) {

    pred_st <- make_stationary(sub[[pred_name]])

    pred_s <- pred_st$series

    for (lag in MAX_LAGS) {

      valid <- complete.cases(target_s, pred_s)

      ts_y <- target_s[valid]
      ts_x <- pred_s[valid]

      if (length(ts_y) < lag + 10) next

      res <- tryCatch(
        grangertest(ts_y ~ ts_x, order = lag),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )

      if (is.null(res)) next

      all_results[[length(all_results) + 1]] <- tibble(
        commodity   = comm,
        predictor   = pred_name,
        lag         = lag,
        f_stat      = round(res$F[2], 4),
        p_value     = round(res$`Pr(>F)`[2], 4),
        significant = res$`Pr(>F)`[2] < ALPHA
      )
    }
  }
}

results_df <- bind_rows(all_results)
```

---

# ALL GRANGER CAUSALITY TESTS

```{r echo=FALSE}
kable(results_df)
```

---

# BEST LAG PER PREDICTOR

```{r}
best_df <- results_df %>%
  group_by(commodity, predictor) %>%
  slice_min(p_value, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(commodity, p_value)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
kable(
  best_df %>%
    select(
      commodity,
      predictor,
      lag,
      f_stat,
      p_value,
      significant
    )
)
```

---

# SIGNIFICANT GRANGER CAUSAL RELATIONSHIPS

```{r}
sig_df <- best_df %>%
  filter(significant)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
if (nrow(sig_df) > 0) {

  kable(
    sig_df %>%
      select(
        commodity,
        predictor,
        lag,
        f_stat,
        p_value
      )
  )

} else {

  cat("No significant Granger-causal relationships found.")
}
```
